race.description: J.a.c Electrical & Solar/Coldstream Air Conditioning Mdn Plate
race.comment: SATIN AND CASH (13) has mixed her form since resuming but got things back on last start when closing off nicely into fourth, in her first run for the new stable. Peaking now and looks ready to break the ice. ADEQUATE EZE (1) gave backers a sight when resuming but just lacked a fitness edge late. Among the leading chances with the run under his belt. STEADY ON (8) returns and should find this a bit easier company. Gets in well with the claim and is one to watch for late if they overdo it in front. NO WOMAN NO CRY (4) steps out in the new colours after finding provincial company too tough in his debut prep. Has good early toe and should be giving a sight. KING'S EYE (11) disappointed on debut but can improve with that run out of the way.
